hero.headline: Make every gift feel understood across cultures
hero.description: Upload a gift image and get clear cultural guidance that helps you gift with confidence, respect, and warmth in any market.
hero.panelHeadline: A global gifting experience built for real people
hero.panelDesc: Beyond generic outputs, it explains why a choice is appropriate so your intent lands with care.

recognition.title: Step 1: Upload Gift Image
recognition.description: Use AI image recognition to identify the gift you want to send
recognition.upload: Click to upload or drag and drop
recognition.placeholder: Supports JPG and PNG formats, max 5MB

country.title: Step 2: Select Target Country
country.description: Choose the recipient's country to get accurate cultural taboos and recommendations

analysis.title: Step 3: Get Cultural Analysis
analysis.description: AI generates risk assessment and personalized recommendations based on gift and target country culture
analysis.loading: Generating cultural analysis, may take a moment due to network conditions...
analysis.noRecognition: Please upload and recognize a gift first
analysis.noCountry: Please select a target country first

tooltip.culturalFit: Cultural Fit Score measures how well the gift aligns with the target country's cultural expectations on a scale of 0-100. Higher scores indicate better cultural compatibility.
tooltip.riskLevel: Cultural Risk Level indicates whether the gift contains cultural taboos or could cause offense in the target country. It assesses color taboos, number taboos, flower taboos, and other cultural dimensions.
tooltip.semanticSignals: Semantic Signals refer to the potential meanings and symbolic significance the gift carries in that culture. For example, certain flowers may symbolize death, and certain colors may be inappropriate for specific occasions.
tooltip.packaging: Packaging recommendations include color combinations, pattern choices, and visual elements that ensure the entire gift experience aligns with cultural expectations.
tooltip.greetingCard: Greeting card suggestions provide culturally appropriate messages, color schemes, and forbidden text, helping you convey your wishes completely and respectfully.

errors.uploadFailed: Image upload failed, please try again
errors.recognitionFailed: Recognition failed, please ensure the image contains a valid gift
errors.analysisFailed: Analysis failed, please check your network connection and try again
